next_steps: Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
Technetium-99m pyrophosphate (PYP) or DPD/HMDP scintigraphy to evaluate for TTR cardiac amyloidosis
Endomyocardial biopsy with Congo red staining if imaging is inconclusive
Genetic testing for TTR gene mutation (TTR amyloidosis) and lysosomal storage disorders
Cardiac PET/CT to evaluate for sarcoidosis
Serum free light-chain assay and serum/urine immunofixation electrophoresis
Genetic testing for TTR gene mutations and lysosomal storage disorders (Fabry, etc.)
Endomyocardial biopsy if non-invasive testing is inconclusive
Evaluation for systemic amyloid deposition (e.g., abdominal fat pad biopsy or biopsy of suspected GI involvement)
Cardiac MRI re-review for classic patterns of amyloid vs. infiltrative disease
